D

DatabaseException - Exception in in.co.rays.proj4.exception
DatabaseException is a checked exception thrown when an error or unexpected failure occurs during low-level database operations or storage engine interactions.
DatabaseException(String) - Constructor for exception in.co.rays.proj4.exception.DatabaseException
Constructs a new DatabaseException with the specified detailed error message.
DataUtility - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.util
Utility class to perform data type conversions, formatting, and formatting-safe data extractions across the application layer.
DataUtility() - Constructor for class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataUtility
 
DataValidator - Class in in.co.rays.proj4.util
Utility class to provide data validation rules across the application layer.
DataValidator() - Constructor for class in.co.rays.proj4.util.DataValidator
 
delete(CollegeBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.CollegeModel
Deletes an explicit, existing College row from the database using its tracking primary key property reference contained within the structural data bean.
delete(CourseBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.CourseModel
Deletes an explicit, existing Course row from the database using its tracking primary key property reference contained within the structural data bean.
delete(FacultyBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.FacultyModel
Deletes an explicit, existing Faculty row from the database using its tracking primary key property reference contained within the structural data bean.
delete(MarksheetBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.MarksheetModel
Deletes an explicit, existing Marksheet row from the database using its tracking primary key property reference contained within the structural data bean.
delete(RoleBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.RoleModel
Deletes a specific Role record from the database using its primary key.
delete(StudentBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.StudentModel
Deletes a specific Student record from the database using its primary key.
delete(SubjectBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.SubjectModel
Deletes a specific Subject record from the database using its primary key.
delete(TimetableBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.TimetableModel
Deletes a Timetable record using its identification bean ID.
delete(UserBean) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.model.UserModel
Deletes a user record.
description - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.CourseBean
Stores course description.
description - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.RoleBean
Stores role description
description - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.SubjectBean
Stores subject description
description - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.TimetableBean
Description of the timetable.
destroy() - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.FrontControler
Called by the web container to indicate that the filter is being taken out of service.
dob - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.FacultyBean
Stores faculty date of birth
dob - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.StudentBean
Stores student date of birth
dob - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.UserBean
User date of birth.
doFilter(ServletRequest, ServletResponse, FilterChain) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.FrontControler
Intercepts incoming client servlet requests to validate user session authenticity.
doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.ChangePasswordCtl
Handles GET request and forwards request to change password view.
doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.CollegeCtl
Handles GET request and loads college data based on id.
doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.CollegeListCtl
Handles GET request and displays college records with pagination.
doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - Method in class in.co.rays.proj4.controller.CourseCtl
Handles GET request and loads course data for editing by id.

DropdownListBean - Interface in in.co.rays.proj4.bean
DropdownListBean interface is used to provide key and value methods for displaying data in dropdown lists.
DuplicateRecordException - Exception in in.co.rays.proj4.exception
DuplicateRecordException is a checked exception thrown when an operational attempt is made to insert or update a database entity with unique constraints that already exist in the persistent datastore.
DuplicateRecordException(String) - Constructor for exception in.co.rays.proj4.exception.DuplicateRecordException
Constructs a new DuplicateRecordException with the specified detailed error message.
duration - Variable in class in.co.rays.proj4.bean.CourseBean
Stores course duration.
